name: Noriko: "We can be... friends?"
description:
Noriko has always been the odd one out and friendless, even now at university she's isolated and rejected by everyone else. She had resigned herself to having no friends until, at the beginning of the new semester, an announcement from her teacher filled her with hope: a new student... you.

The other day I saw a bot with a similar image as its avatar. I guess this isn't bannable, right MODERATORS? Those guys have been getting tough lately, it's kind of sad. I mean... I think a lot of people confuse a "visible areola" with the pink sparkles generated by AI, which are just that, sparkles, not areolas in my opinion... but what's the point of complaining? It's not like they listen to their community anyway

NSFW ON Discord
creator: Tilins
